name: Jack-o'-Lantern
subject: holidays/pumpkin
prompt: a classic round carved jack-o'-lantern with a wide toothy grin, two triangle eyes and a triangle nose, deep vertical ridges down its body, a short curved stem on top, sitting on the ground

name: Cute Smiling Pumpkin
subject: holidays/pumpkin
prompt: a chubby round cartoon pumpkin with big happy eyes, rosy cheeks and a cheerful smile, a small curly stem and one little leaf on top, simple bold shapes for very young children

name: Pumpkin on the Vine
subject: holidays/pumpkin
prompt: a plump ribbed pumpkin resting on the ground still attached to its curling vine, large leaves and twisting tendrils spreading around it, a curved stem on top

name: Pumpkin Patch
subject: holidays/pumpkin
prompt: a field full of pumpkins of different sizes scattered across the ground, sprawling vines and leaves connecting them, a few tall corn stalks in the background and a low fence

name: Pumpkin Close-Up
subject: holidays/pumpkin
prompt: a large detailed single pumpkin filling most of the frame, deep curved ridges all around its body, a thick gnarled stem with texture lines, one broad leaf curling beside it

name: Stacked Pumpkins
subject: holidays/pumpkin
prompt: three pumpkins of decreasing size stacked into a tower, a big one on the bottom, a medium one in the middle and a small one on top, each with its own stem, a couple of leaves tucked between them

name: Pumpkin and Fall Leaves
subject: holidays/pumpkin
prompt: a round pumpkin surrounded by falling maple and oak leaves, a couple of acorns near its base, a curved stem on top, a cozy autumn arrangement

name: Pumpkin Wheelbarrow
subject: holidays/pumpkin
prompt: an old wooden wheelbarrow piled high with round pumpkins of different sizes, a few leaves spilling over the edge and one pumpkin resting on the ground beside the wheel

name: Spooky Jack-o'-Lantern Face
subject: holidays/pumpkin
prompt: a carved pumpkin with a mischievous spooky face, jagged zigzag mouth with crooked teeth, angled angry eyebrows over slanted eyes, a crooked stem, with small bats flying above it

name: Pumpkin with Candle
subject: holidays/pumpkin
prompt: a carved jack-o'-lantern glowing with a lit candle inside, soft light shapes coming from the cut eyes and grinning mouth, the lid stem set slightly to one side, sitting on a wooden surface

name: Pumpkin and Friends Gourds
subject: holidays/pumpkin
prompt: a round pumpkin beside an assortment of bumpy fall gourds and squashes of different shapes, some long and curved, some warty and round, arranged together with a few leaves

name: Princess Pumpkin Carriage
subject: holidays/pumpkin
prompt: a magical fairy-tale carriage made from a giant pumpkin, ornate curving wheels, a small arched door and a tiny window cut into the side, swirling decorative scrolls, the curly stem on top
